titleStmt.title: SII 29.64: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 64. (A.R. No. 91 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALAGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab fixed into the proper right side wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the main shrine of the Vīranārāyaṇasvāmī temple.

It states that when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva was ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇapura, mahāpradhāna bāṇasaverggaḍe Anantapāla-daṇḍanāyaka made a gift of income derived from the taxes vaṭṭapārikāya and kāvalideṟe of the village Piriya-Pembaṟiti belonging to the temple and situated in Hoḷalu-12 for worship and offerings to the god Jagaddēvanārāyaṇa.
The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 31, Sarvajit, Pushya, śu. 9, Wednesday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1107 A.D., December 25, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa
śrī matribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārka
tāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁka
thā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpāda padmōpajī
vi samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantā
dhipati mahāpracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudha varadā
yakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ gōtra pavitraṁ parāṁganā putra tura
garēvantaṁ vairi kṛtāṁtaṁ sāhasatuṁganayyana siṁgaṁ
nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dāna bāṇasuverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ Anantapāḷa
yyaṁgaḷu śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama varṣada 31
neya sarvvajitsaṁvatsarada puṣya śudha nava
mi budhavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu
rājadhāni koḷḷiyapākeya śrīmajagaddēva nārāyaṇa
dēvariṁgāḷva hoḷalu haṁneraḍaṟa baḷiya piriya poṁba
ṟitiya vaṭṭapārikāyamumaṁ kāvalideṟeyu
maṁ dēvara bhōgakke dhārāpūrvva māḍi koṭṭarīdha
rmamanārorbbaṁ pratipāḷisuva
svadattā paradattāṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁdharāṁFigures of Sun and Moon in line 22 and Nandi in 23 are carved.
ṣaṣṭhiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā(yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ) .
Digital edition of SII 29.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
